about_section.label: About us
about_section.p1: Lubotech is a company specialising in designing, building and automating machines and production lines.
about_section.p2: We offer comprehensive solutions supporting companies in modernising and optimising their production processes across Europe.

services_section.label: What we do
services_section.title: Complete
services_section.description: We specialise in designing, building and automating machines and production lines. We support companies in modernising and optimising their processes.

mechanika.title: Mechanics
mechanika.subtitle: Machine Design, Assembly & Relocation
mechanika.description: We specialise in designing and building special machines, assembling and relocating production lines, and providing mechanical service for industry.
items: Design and construction of special machines
Assembly and relocation of production lines

elektryka.title: Electrics
elektryka.subtitle: Installations, Control Cabinets, Measurements, EPLAN
elektryka.description: Comprehensive electrical services for industry — from designing control cabinets, through installations, to measurements and EPLAN documentation.
items: Design and construction of control cabinets

automatyka.title: Automation
automatyka.subtitle: Programming & Process Automation
automatyka.description: We automate and optimise production processes — from PLC controller programming, through robotisation, to SCADA systems and Industry 4.0 solutions.

pneumatyka.title: Pneumatics
pneumatyka.subtitle: System Design & Optimisation
pneumatyka.description: We design, assemble and optimise pneumatic systems for machines and production lines. We work with all leading component suppliers.
items: Component selection: Festo, SMC, Bosch Rexroth

faq.question: Do you design custom special machines?
faq.answer: Yes. We create special machines and robotic workstations tailored to individual production process requirements. We design from scratch — from concept to finished product.

faq.question: Do you provide service and technical support?
faq.answer: We provide warranty and post-warranty service, inspections, modernisations and remote support. We ensure production line continuity and quick response to customer needs.

faq.question: Do you handle production line relocation?
faq.answer: Yes. We offer comprehensive production line relocation — dismantling, transport, reassembly, system integration and commissioning at the new location.

faq.question: Do you modernise existing production lines?
faq.answer: We offer modernisations and optimisations of production lines, including controller replacement, robot integration, workstation rebuilding, efficiency improvement and safety enhancement.

faq.question: Do you perform electrical installation measurements?
faq.answer: Yes. We perform professional electrical measurements of installations, machines and production lines in accordance with applicable standards. We provide full documentation with measurement results and recommendations.

faq.question: How many countries do you serve?
faq.answer: We have provided services in 13 European countries. We carry out projects in Poland and abroad — in Germany, Czech Republic, Slovakia and other European countries.

contact_section.label: Contact
contact_section.title: Get in
contact_section.description: We respond within 24 hours. You can also visit us directly at our headquarters in Pyskowice.

about.hero_description: Lubotech is a company with over 20 years of experience in designing, building and automating machines and production lines. We operate in Poland and 13 European countries.
about.mission_p1: Lubotech's mission is to deliver innovative engineering solutions that increase the efficiency and competitiveness of our clients. We carry out projects comprehensively — from concept to implementation and service.
about.mission_p2: Our vision is to be a leader in industrial automation in Poland and Central Europe, growing with our clients and implementing the latest Industry 4.0 technologies.
about.cta_description: Contact us and tell us about your project. We will prepare a personalised offer.

services.hero_description: Four key departments — mechanics, electrics, automation and pneumatics — create a comprehensive solution for your production facility.
services.bottom_description: We are not just a subcontractor — we are a technology partner. We take full responsibility for the entire project.

projects.hero_description: Every project is proof of our commitment and dedication to the highest quality. We deliver for the largest industrial companies in Europe.

contact.hero_description: We are ready to listen to your project. Contact us — we will respond within 24 hours.

service_detail.detail_suffix: We treat every assignment individually — we select the optimal technical solution and provide full support.
service_detail.cta_description: Contact us — we will quote the project and propose the best technical solution.

timeline.title: Company founded
timeline.description: Lubotech begins operations in Pyskowice as a mechanical company serving local industrial plants.

timeline.title: Expansion into electrics
timeline.description: Extension of services to include comprehensive electrical services and control cabinet construction. First foreign contracts.

timeline.title: Automation & robotisation
timeline.description: Launch of automation department. Completion of first robotic workstations for the automotive industry.

timeline.title: 13 countries, 85 employees
timeline.description: Dynamic growth — the company has 85 employees and carries out projects in 13 European countries.

timeline.title: 120+ completed projects
timeline.description: We exceed 120 projects. We are developing our competences in Industry 4.0 and SCADA systems.

values.title: Quality
values.description: Every project is carried out with the utmost attention to detail. We apply ISO standards and industry best practices.

values.title: Team
values.description: 85 experienced engineers and technicians ready to carry out even the most demanding projects.

values.title: Innovation
values.description: We continuously follow new technologies and implement Industry 4.0 solutions, robotisation and vision systems.

values.title: Timeliness
values.description: We meet agreed deadlines. Every project is planned in detail to be ready on time.

values.title: Reach
values.description: We operate in 13 European countries. No project is too far for us — we are where our client is.

values.title: Reliability
values.description: Warranty and post-warranty service, remote support. We are with the client throughout the entire machine lifecycle.
